---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or idea for OpenMarket
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposal

Describe the feature or change you'd like.

## Decision Filter Check

- [ ] If protocols change, does this feature still make sense?
- [ ] Can a solo developer build this without operating a services business?
- [ ] Does this keep the platform thin and essential?
